programmes.show_description: Drama with Jason Sudeikis. The rise and fall of auto-mogul John DeLorean, told through his friendship with FBI informant Jim Hoffman - proving that even the fastest cars can hit dead ends. (2018)
Audacious action with Orlando Bloom. When a washed up private security agent's mission in Shangai goes awry, he must outsmart a gang of dangerous criminals to survive (2017).
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Audacious action with Orlando Bloom. When a washed up private security agent's mission in Shangai goes awry, he must outsmart a gang of dangerous criminals to survive (2017).
Turbulent adventure with David Chokachi, Ruth Kearney and Steven Hartley. Batten down the hatches as a TV weatherman and a scientist team up to save humanity from a deadly weather phenomenon (2013).
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.

Investigating the disappearance of a client and friend, Mannering uncovers a bizarre sect intent on defrauding its hapless followers and he is top of their hit list for assassination.
Vengeful western starring Robert Lansing and Patrick Wayne. When two bounty hunters tracking a killer are injured in a gunfight, can they work as one to take down their prey? (1966)
Western starring Barbara Stanwyck and Joel McCrea. There's track trouble, train wrecks and love triangles in the Wild West as two railroads compete to be the first to reach California. (1939)

John Cannon's family arrives at a ranch near Tucson, Ariz. His wife names it High Chaparral. Early on they learn they have two enemies, who steal their cattle.
The Ministry suspect that Steed has become a double agent when he starts to behave suspiciously. But can he keep his secret safe and save Purdey ?
The Avengers find themselves investigating the death of a man who is found with £50,000 of stolen diamonds in his stomach. Will a number of dog hairs enable Peel and Steed to solve the case?
Mannering is at the centre of an elaborate deception around the sale of the Seven Eyes of Night, a necklace once owned by the Empress Joséphine and now in the hands of a dangerous gang.
Non-stop action starring Sylvester Stallone. After explosions seal off a commuter tunnel beneath the Hudson River, does one man have what it takes to get the survivors to the surface? (1996)

A fellow stagecoach passenger seems to be unusually knowledgeable about a killer Hollister is hunting.
Hollister springs into action after the nearby town of Sunglow is besieged by criminals in the wake of its sheriff's murder.
John and Buck go south to strike a deal with Montoya. They encounter the man who stole John's horse and says he can take them to Montoya. He turns out to be Montoya's delinquent son.
The team's latest investigation leads them to France where a series of incidents have taken place. Have the sites been specifically chosen or are they simply a coincidence (1/2) ?
Steed and Peel find themselves embroiled in a blackmail scheme that targets millionaires. Can they solve the case before someone really is killed?
Mannering and Cordelia travel to a Balkan state to broker an antiques deal with the widow of a former president. Once there they discover she is on the run from the newly installed dictator.
Explosive action starring John Cena and Robert Patrick. When ruthless diamond thieves kidnap his wife, an ex-marine becomes a one-man army on a relentless mission to get her back. (2006)
